title: Remich, Remich Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Remich, Remich Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Remich is a city in Remich Canton with a population of 3,800. A picturesque wine town on the Moselle River, known as the pearl of Luxembourg’s wine region, with scenic riverfront promenades and excellent Riesling vineyards.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
